name: Ballee: Attack of the Zombie Elves

reviews.review_title: 🎄 Defend Christmas in Mixed Reality Fun
reviews.review_description:
Attack of the Zombie Elves is a fun and festive MR game where your mission is to protect the Christmas tree from waves of mischievous zombie elves. The holiday theme is creative and instantly sets a playful tone.

One of the most original features is the ability to scan a real ball in your room, which the headset then tracks and lets you physically push the naughty elves away — a clever and immersive use of Mixed Reality. A great way to dive into the Christmas spirit in VR while saving Christmas in a very hands-on way.
